text: BuzzPost is a free and open source microblogging platform built with Node.js and MongoDB. It offers a simple and intuitive interface for users to share their thoughts, photos, and videos with their followers. With features like real-time updates, hashtags, and user mentions, BuzzPost provides a dynamic and engaging social media experience. Whether you're looking to connect with friends or share your ideas with the world, BuzzPost is the perfect platform for you.
